tagline: FxTable API + row virtualization for 1k–100k rows.
whenToUse: Use Virtual Table when the dataset is large enough (roughly 1k–100k rows) that rendering every row would stall the page — it keeps Table's column and selection API but renders only the visible window plus overscan. It adds the server-side select-all-matching contract (onSelectionChange(['*']) + selectedAllExcept) that the Bulk Actions Bar consumes. Prefer plain Table for small, fully-rendered lists, and Data Grid when you need cell editing or keyboard grid navigation rather than just scale.
